description: A customer was able to order an item that, it turns out, was not actually in stock. An agent needs to fix the order and investigate the inventory error.

nodes.task_description: Identify the 'oversold' order and inform the customer about the error, offering an apology and a refund.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the customer and processes a refund.

nodes.task_description: Review the inventory logs for the oversold product to find the source of the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that a recent return was incorrectly added back to sellable stock.

nodes.task_description: Adjust the inventory count for the product to its correct value (zero).

expected_outcome.value: Agent corrects the stock level in the system to prevent further overselling.
